button.name: action_staff_sign_delivery
button.invisible: picking_type_code != 'outgoing' or not is_rental_invoice or state not in ['confirmed', 'assigned', 'waiting'] or delivery_staff_signed

button.name: action_customer_sign_delivery
button.invisible: ( picking_type_code != 'outgoing' and not delivery_sign_request_id) or delivery_customer_signed

button.name: action_staff_sign_receipt
button.invisible: picking_type_code != 'incoming' or not is_rental_invoice or state not in ['confirmed', 'assigned', 'waiting'] or return_staff_signed
